patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Realm Divided Patch 3
description: Realm Divided Patch 3 Combat Balance Changes (26 January 2026) — Arcane Staffs, Frost Staffs, Holy Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Swords, Axes, War Gloves, Helmets, Armors, Shoes, Mounts, Miscellaneous.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Chain Missile Arcane charges damage Frost Staffs Glacial Obelisk Damage Explosion radius Recast time window Holy Staffs Ascended Duration Shapeshifter Staffs Crystalburst Stillgaze Staff Range Area duration Total area damage Swords Mighty Blow Broadsword Cooldown resets kill knockdown Heroic Charges Axes Relentless Assault Crystal Reaper Physical magical damage War Gloves Dragon Leap 1st cast 2nd cast Triple Kick vs mobs Helmets Smokebomb Hellion Hood Invisibility world interactions Armors Fury Soldier Armor Deactivating toggle cooldown Shoes Delayed Teleport Mage Sandals Resistances buff duration Elbow Smash Judicator Boots Knock up duration Mark of Sacrifice Hellion Shoes Channel interrupted Swift Cut Assassin Shoes Damage Mounts Soulspindle Pounce Soulspinner Time window Range Movespeed buff Miscellaneous Healing debuff 2v2 Hellgates Duo Mists Duo Depths Trio Depths Corrupted Dungeons Solo Mists

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Chain Missile Arcane charges damage 55 60

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Glacial Obelisk Damage 70 77 Explosion damage radius 5m 6m Recast time window 5s 6s Always deals damage after 6s detonated early

changes.raw_text: Glacial Obelisk: Damage: 70 → 77; Explosion damage radius: 5m → 6m; Recast time window: 5s → 6s; Now always deals damage after 6s (can still be detonated early).
notes: Now always deals damage after 6s (can still be detonated early)

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Ascended Duration Cast Protection 2.5s 2s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Crystalburst Stillgaze Staff Range 10m 11m Area duration 3s 3.5s Total area damage 174 201

changes.raw_text: Crystalburst: Range: 10m → 11m; Area duration: 3s → 3.5s; Total area damage: 174 → 201

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Mighty Blow Broadsword Cooldown resets on kill knockdown No longer consumes Heroic Charges

changes.raw_text: Mighty Blow: Cooldown now resets on kill or knockdown; No longer consumes Heroic Charges.
notes: Cooldown now resets on kill or knockdown

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Relentless Assault Crystal Reaper Physical magical damage

changes.raw_text: Relentless Assault: Now deals physical rather than magical damage

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Dragon Leap 1st cast damage 70 95 2nd cast damage 85 70 Triple Kick vs mobs per tick 60 85

changes.raw_text: Dragon Leap: 1st cast damage: 70 → 95; 2nd cast damage: 85 → 70
Triple Kick: Damage vs mobs per tick: 60 → 85

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Smokebomb Hellion Hood Invisibility removed world interactions

changes.raw_text: Smokebomb: Invisibility is now removed on world interactions
notes: Invisibility is now removed on world interactions

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Fury Soldier Armor Deactivating toggle early cooldown 60s

changes.raw_text: Fury: Deactivating the toggle early sets the cooldown to 60s
notes: Deactivating the toggle early sets the cooldown to 60s

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Delayed Teleport Mage Sandals Resistances buff duration 2s 3s Elbow Smash Judicator Boots Knock up duration 0.8s 1s Mark of Sacrifice Hellion Shoes Channel no longer interrupted Swift Cut Assassin Shoes Damage 102 90

changes.raw_text: Mark of Sacrifice: Channel can no longer be interrupted (dash still can be)
notes: Channel can no longer be interrupted (dash still can be)

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Soulspindle Pounce Soulspinner Time window 2.5s 3s Range 20m 15m Movespeed buff duration 4s 5s

changes.raw_text: Soulspindle Pounce: Time window: 2.5s → 3s; Range: 20m → 15m; Movespeed buff duration: 4s → 5s

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Healing debuff 2v2 Hellgates Duo Mists Duo Depths Trio Depths 30% 35% Corrupted Dungeons Solo Mists 30% 40%

changes.raw_text: 2v2 Hellgates, Duo Mists, Duo Depths, and Trio Depths: Healing debuff: 30% → 35%. Corrupted Dungeons and Solo Mists: Healing debuff: 30% → 40%.

stats.name: Healing debuff (2v2 Hellgates / Duo Mists / Duo Depths / Trio Depths)
